description_long: This is a stylized adult male pedestrian with a modern, urban appearance. He wears a short-sleeved athletic shirt with a bold number '10' and the word 'CREATIVE' printed on the back, paired with cropped jogger pants that have a side stripe detail. His footwear consists of low-top sneakers, and he sports a distinctive, voluminous hairstyle. The figure's face is partially covered by a sleek, fitted mask, adding a contemporary, streetwear-inspired touch. A small cylindrical object, possibly a spray can or similar accessory, is attached to his right hip. The overall look is casual and sporty, suitable for a youthful city environment.
description: A modern urban male pedestrian in athletic wear, with a mask, jogger pants, and a spray can accessory at his hip.
description_view_0: Front view shows the mask, shirt details, and spray can accessory on the right hip.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the mask, hairstyle, and the cylindrical object at the hip.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the 'CREATIVE' text and number '10' on the shirt, as well as the back of the hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizes the shirt's side design, jogger pants, and the spray can's attachment.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved athletic shirt and cropped jogger pants with a fitted mask
